sources.title: Innocent Campers Become Hunted Prey | Full Movie | Free Action Survival | Guns Of Eden
sources.description:
*Guns Of Eden* - Megan, her partner Jeremy, and his friends Blake and Gabriella go camping for the weekend. In the woods, they witness the execution of a drug trafficker by the local sheriff and his deputies. The campers attempt to flee, but the deputies seal off the mountain, and the sheriff gets an armed militia to hunt the strangers.

2022 | Stars: Alexandra Faye Sadeghian, Bill Kennedy, Peter Johnson

metadata.Plot: Megan, a Buffalo police officer suffering from PTSD, goes on a weekend camping trip with her partner Jeremy and his friends Blake and Gabriella. When Megan and Jeremy witness an execution by a rogue sheriff's department, the quartet finds itself hunted by different factions of an armed militia.
metadata.Actors: Alexandra Faye Sadeghian, Bill Kennedy, Peter Johnson
